title: Decoding host-microbiome interactions through co-expression network analysis
author: Mika, Uehara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Supplementary Table Captions: Supplementary Table S9. Evaluation and parameter determination of host and microbiome RNA read classification using simulation datasets Supplementary Table S10. 40 pathways significantly upregulated in the cecum as compared to the transverse colon Supplementary Table S11. Host-microbiome gene co-expression network edges Supplementary Table S12. Host-host gene co-expression network edges Supplementary Table S13. Microbiome-microbiome gene co-expression network edges Supplementary Table S14. List of genes included in each gene module identified from the gene co-expression network Supplementary Table S15. Number of microbiome RNA reads annotated by the KEGG database Supplementary Table S18. Results of enrichment analysis of gene modules for each parameter Supplementary Table S19.
